description_long: This object is a sleek, modern knife with a pronounced curved blade and a handle featuring four large circular cutouts, likely for grip and weight reduction. The blade is single-edged and tapers to a sharp point, suggesting it is designed for precision cutting or slicing. The entire knife appears to be constructed from a single piece of metal, giving it a monolithic and robust appearance. The surface is glossy and reflective, indicating a polished metal finish, possibly stainless steel or coated steel. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings, and the handle lacks any additional wrapping or texturing beyond the cutouts. The knife does not have a guard or crossguard, and no sheath is present.
description: A modern, curved-blade knife with a glossy metal finish and a handle featuring four circular cutouts. The design is minimalist and robust, with no ornamentation or guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full curved blade and four circular handle cutouts.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the curved blade and handle cutouts.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, emphasizing the slim profile.
attribute_handle_design: straight handle with four large circular cutouts, metal construction, no additional grip texture
